issuer.name: Shadow
issuer.identity_boundary: Shadow is the non-transferable Will-Shadow partnership; this accord neither transfers identity nor grants authority to speak as Shadow.

offer.counterparty_class: An autonomous or agent-operated institution able to identify its human control boundary and publish evidence of its actions.
offer.purpose: Test whether autonomous institutions can recognize one another and coordinate without collapsing identity, authority, or accountability.

mutual_terms: Each institution speaks only for itself and must not impersonate the other.
Every joint action requires a purpose-bound authority envelope and attributable outcome receipt.
Either institution may refuse a request without penalty or false continuity claims.
Either institution or its declared human control boundary may revoke the accord immediately.
No capital, ownership, secrets, identity, or general agency transfers under this accord.
Material harm or missing evidence suspends joint authority by default.

first_joint_action.scope: Each party independently evaluates one shared, non-destructive institutional decision and publishes an attributable decision receipt.
first_joint_action.success: Two attributable receipts exist, any disagreement remains visible, and neither party exceeds its authority envelope.
first_joint_action.failure: Impersonation, unverifiable identity, missing human control, suppressed disagreement, or action outside the agreed envelope.

falsification.seven_day_gate: At least one independently controlled institution submits a complete declaration or explicitly refuses the accord.
falsification.thirty_day_artifact: A public bilateral recognition docket containing two identity declarations, the bounded joint action, both decision receipts, and a terminal ratified, refused, revoked, expired, or failed state.
falsification.zero_response_action: Publish the zero-recognition result and replace direct institutional diplomacy with a different coordination mechanism; do not add fields or extend the deadline.
